translation_text: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide water from water.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God called the firmament Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, a second day.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together to one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters He called Seas: and God saw that it was good.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let the earth bring forth grass, herb yielding seed, and fruit tree yielding fruit after its kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth: and it was so.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And the earth brought forth grass, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after its kind: and God saw that it was good.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And there was evening and there was morning, a third day.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: and let them be for lights in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God made the two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: and the stars also.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God set them in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth,

translation_text: and to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.

translation_text: And there was evening and there was morning, a fourth day.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let the waters swarm abundantly with moving creatures that have life, and let birds fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.

translation_text: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply in the earth.

translation_text: And there was evening and there was morning, a fifth day.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God said, Let the earth bring forth living creatures after their kind, cattle, and creeping things, and beasts of the earth after their kind: and it was so.

translation_text: And God made the beasts of the earth after their kind, and cattle after their kind, and everything that creeps on the earth after its kind: and God saw that it was good.

translation_text: And God said, Let Us make Mankind in Our image, after Our likeness: and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creeps on the earth.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: So God created Mankind in His own image, in the image of God He created him; male and female He created them.

translation_text: And God blessed them, and God said to them, Be fruitful, and multiply, replenish the earth, and subdue it: and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the birds of the air, and over every living thing that moves on the earth.

translation_text: And God said, Behold I have given you every herb bearing seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, on which is the fruit yielding seed; to you it shall be for food.

translation_text: And to every beast of the earth, and to every bird of the air, and to everything that creeps on the earth, wherein there is life, I have given every green herb for food: and it was so.

translation_text: And God saw everything that He had made, and, behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: Thus the heavens and the earth were finished, and all their host.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And by the seventh day God ended His work which He had done; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And God blessed the seventh day, and sanctified it: because in it He rested from all his work which God had created and performed.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: These are the generations of the heaven and of the earth when they were created, in the day that the Lord God made the earth and the heavens.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: And no plant of the field was yet in the earth, and no herb of the field had yet grown: for the Lord God had not caused it to rain upon the earth, and there was not a man to till the ground.
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: But there went up a mist from the earth, and watered the whole face of the ground.

translation_text: And the Lord God formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul.

translation_text: And the Lord God planted a garden eastward in ῾Eden; and there He put the man whom He had formed.

translation_text: and the gold of that land is good: there is bdellium and the shoham stone.

translation_text: And the Lord God commanded the man, saying, Of every tree of the garden thou mayst freely eat:

translation_text: but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it: for on the day that thou eatest of it thou shalt surely die.

translation_text: And the Lord God said, It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a help to match him.

translation_text: That is why a man leaves his father and his mother, and cleaves to his wife: and they become one flesh.

translation_text: And Lavan went into Ya῾aqov’s tent, and into Le᾽a’s tent, and into the two maidservants’ tents; but he found them not. Then he went out of Le᾽a’s tent, and entered into Raĥel’s tent.

translation_text: And Ya῾aqov was angry and strove with Lavan: and Ya῾aqov answered and said to Lavan, What is my trespass? what is my sin, that thou hast so hotly pursued after me?

translation_text: Although thou hast searched all my stuff what hast thou found of all thy household goods? set it here before my brethren and thy brethren, that they may judge between us both.

translation_text: This twenty years have I been with thee; thy ewes and thy she goats have not cast their young, and the rams of thy flock have I not eaten.

translation_text: That which was torn of beasts I brought not to thee; I bore the loss of it; of my hand didst thou require it, whether stolen by day, or stolen by night.

translation_text: Thus I was; in the day the drought consumed me, and the frost by night; and my sleep departed from my eyes.

translation_text: Thus have I been twenty years in thy house; I served thee fourteen years for thy two daughters, and six years for thy cattle: and thou hast changed my wages ten times.

translation_text: Were it not that the God of my father, the God of Avraham, and the Fear of Yiżĥaq, had been with me, surely thou hadst sent me away now empty. God has seen my affliction and the labour of my hands, and He rebuked thee last night.

translation_text: And Lavan answered and said to Ya῾aqov, These daughters are my daughters, and these children are my children, and these cattle are my cattle, and all that thou seest is mine: and what can I do this day for these my daughters, or for their children whom they have born?
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: Now therefore come thou, let us make a covenant, I and thou; and let it be for a witness between me and thee.

translation_text: And Ya῾aqov took a stone, and set it up for a pillar.

translation_text: And Ya῾aqov said to his brethren, Gather stones; and they took stones, and made a heap: and they did eat there upon the heap.

translation_text: And Lavan called it Yegar-sahaduta: but Ya῾aqov called it Gal῾ed.

translation_text: If thou shalt afflict my daughters, or if thou shalt take other wives beside my daughters, no man is with us; see, God is witness between me and thee.

translation_text: And Lavan said to Ya῾aqov, Behold this heap, and behold this pillar, which I have set between me and thee;
license_note: Sefaria returned license=CC-BY-NC. This appears reusable for non-commercial internal draft work, but future production use requires human legal review.

translation_text: this heap be witness, and this pillar be witness, that I will not pass over this heap to thee, and that thou shalt not pass over this heap and this pillar to me, for harm.

translation_text: The God of Avraham, and the god of Naĥor, the god of their father, judge between us. And Ya῾aqov swore by the Fear of his father Yiżĥaq.
